name: Affiliated Trades
description_short: State-chartered Pennsylvania credit union established in 1974, primarily serving IBEW Local 98 North members and their families with low-cost loans, savings accounts, and online banking.
description_long:
Affiliated Trades Credit Union was established in 1974 and is based in Collegeville, Pennsylvania. As a state-chartered credit union, it operates as a member-owned financial cooperative rather than a traditional bank, allowing it to offer lower fees and competitive rates to its membership base.

The credit union serves a specific membership: primarily IBEW (International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers) Local 98 North members, retired members of IBEW Local 380, and their immediate family members. Their service offerings include auto loans (new and used vehicles), personal signature loans, deposit accounts, skip-a-payment loan programs, online and mobile banking, loan applications, membership applications, and mortgage loan services through a partnership with First Heritage Mortgage. They also provide financial education through their ATCU Knowledge Navigator newsletter series and offer financial calculators and a 24/7 VISA Debit call center.

What distinguishes Affiliated Trades is its tight focus on serving union electricians and their families within Pennsylvania, combined with member-centric features like the skip-a-payment program allowing qualifying borrowers to skip one payment per year (up to three times over a loan's life). Their rates are competitive, with new auto loans starting at 4.99% APR and used auto loans at 5.99% APR as of April 2026. The credit union emphasizes financial literacy and planning support alongside traditional lending products.

Affiliated Trades is best suited for union electricians and their families in Pennsylvania seeking lower-cost financial services with a focus on community and member benefits. The primary limitation is membership eligibility—this is not a bank open to the general public. For those who qualify, it represents a solid option for auto financing and personal loans with union-friendly terms and financial planning support.
services: New auto loans (rates as low as 4.99% APR)
Used auto loans (rates as low as 5.99% APR)
Personal signature loans (rates as low as 13.00% APR)
VISA Debit cards with 24/7 call center support
First Heritage Mortgage loan applications and services
ATCU Knowledge Navigator financial literacy newsletters
pros: Competitive auto loan rates as low as 4.99% APR for new vehicles and 5.99% for used vehicles
Skip-a-payment program allows eligible borrowers to skip one payment annually, up to three times during the loan's life
Member-focused credit union structure emphasizes low-cost financial services and efficiency
Free mobile banking apps available for iOS and Android for account management
Financial education resources through ATCU Knowledge Navigator newsletter series
Established 50-year operating history (founded 1974) providing stability and experience
24/7 VISA Debit call center support for cardholders
cons: Membership eligibility is restricted to IBEW Local 98 North members, retired IBEW Local 380 members, and their immediate families—not open to general public
Limited geographic footprint; based only in Collegeville, Pennsylvania with no indication of branches or national presence
Signature loan rates start at 13.00% APR, which is substantially higher than auto loan rates and may not be competitive
No information provided about deposit account interest rates, CDs, or savings account terms
Limited detail on full range of services; mortgage services appear to be provided through a partner (First Heritage Mortgage) rather than in-house
best_for: IBEW Local 98 North union electricians seeking auto financing and personal loans
Families of IBEW members in Pennsylvania wanting member-owned financial institution benefits
Electricians prioritizing skip-a-payment flexibility and financial education alongside traditional banking
diagnosis: Affiliated Trades is best for IBEW union electricians and their families in Pennsylvania seeking member-owned credit union benefits with competitive auto loan rates and flexible skip-a-payment options. The critical caveat is that membership is restricted by occupational and familial affiliation—this is not an option for the general public regardless of creditworthiness.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Affiliated Trades — NCUA-insured credit union in COLLEGEVILLE, PA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
